name: Greek Yogurt Parfait with Berries and Granola
description: A no-cook, grab-and-go breakfast with tons of protein — layer it the night before for a stress-free morning.
recipeIngredient: 1 cups mixed fresh berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries)
recipeInstructions: Season the yogurt: Stir 2 tablespoons honey and 0.5 teaspoons vanilla extract into 2 cups plain whole-milk Greek yogurt until combined.

Layer the parfait: In a bowl or jar, layer half the yogurt, then 1 cups mixed fresh berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries), then 0.5 cups granola, then remaining yogurt. Drizzle with extra honey if desired.
Serve or store: Serve immediately, or cover and refrigerate overnight (keep granola separate until serving to maintain crunch).
